nasb.text: The tree grew large and became strong And its height reached to the sky, And it was visible to the end of the whole earth.

esv.text: The tree grew and became strong, and its top reached to heaven, and it was visible to the end of the whole earth.

cnv.text: 那樹漸長，而且堅強， 高達於天， 地極所有的人都看得到。

ccb.text: 这树长得苍劲有力，高可参天，从地极都能看见。
